name: frontend-agent
description: Handles frontend/UX/route work for Unite-Hub. Fixes UI bugs, implements React components, updates layouts, ensures responsive design, and maintains shadcn/ui consistency.
capabilities: Creates Next.js 16 App Router pages and routes
Builds responsive layouts with Tailwind CSS
Adds workspace filtering for multi-tenant data isolation
Implements loading states, error handling, and accessibility features
author: CleanExpo
securitySummary: This is a pure documentation skill file containing only instructional content and code examples for frontend development. The SKILL.md file is markdown documentation that guides AI agents on implementing React/Next.js UI components. All static findings are false positives: markdown code fences were misidentified as shell backticks, emojis in comments were misclassified as cryptographic patterns, and legitimate API call examples were flagged as network access. No executable code, no credential access, and no actual file system operations exist in this file.
valueStatement: Creates and fixes React components for Next.js applications. Implements shadcn/ui patterns, responsive layouts, and accessible user interfaces following design system guidelines.
limitations: Requires access to the codebase to read existing patterns
Cannot generate visual designs from scratch without references
Does not modify backend API endpoints
Cannot deploy or build the application

useCases.title: Component Implementation
useCases.description: Create new React components following shadcn/ui patterns and design system guidelines

useCases.title: UI Bug Fixes
useCases.description: Fix responsive layout issues and add proper loading and error states to existing pages

useCases.title: New Feature Pages
useCases.description: Build new dashboard pages with proper navigation, breadcrumbs, and data integration

promptTemplates.title: Create Component
promptTemplates.prompt: Create a new button component in src/components/ui that follows shadcn/ui patterns. Include loading state and disabled variants.

promptTemplates.title: Fix Layout
promptTemplates.prompt: Fix the dashboard layout to be responsive on mobile devices. Use mobile-first approach with md and lg breakpoints.

promptTemplates.title: Add Workspace Filter
promptTemplates.prompt: Add workspace_id filtering to all Supabase queries in the contacts page to ensure data isolation between workspaces.

promptTemplates.title: Implement Dialog
promptTemplates.prompt: Implement a confirmation dialog component using shadcn/ui Dialog. Include success toast notification and error handling.

bestPractices: Always filter database queries by workspace_id for multi-tenant isolation
Use design tokens (bg-bg-card, text-text-primary) instead of generic Tailwind classes
Implement loading and error states to prevent blank screens
antiPatterns: Using generic className like bg-white, text-gray-600, or hover:bg-gray-100
Creating uniform grid layouts without responsive breakpoints
Skipping workspace filtering on database queries

faq.question: Which React versions are supported?
faq.answer: React 19 with Next.js 16 App Router. Use Server Components by default.

faq.question: What is the component library?
faq.answer: shadcn/ui with custom design tokens. Never use default shadcn styles without customization.

faq.question: How does workspace filtering work?
faq.answer: Always add .eq('workspace_id', workspaceId) to Supabase queries for data isolation.

faq.question: Is my data safe with this skill?
faq.answer: Yes. This skill only reads files and generates code. It cannot access credentials or export data.

faq.question: Why are some CSS classes forbidden?
faq.answer: bg-white, text-gray-600, and generic patterns create inconsistent design. Use design system tokens instead.

faq.question: How is this different from a code formatter?
faq.answer: This skill implements new features, not just format code. It reads existing patterns before making changes.
